name: hb_1_31
requirements: As part of your analysis, define district emission as the total exhaust_gas over all polluting companies in the district. For 2025-06-15 08:00-18:00 compute and store: total_exhaust_changan (Chang'an District), total_exhaust_jingxing (Jingxing Mining District) (float), higher_emission_district_id (the district_id of the higher-emission district, int), emission_ratio (higher/lower, float).

turns.query: Compare the emission levels between Chang'an District and Jingxing Mining District in Shijiazhuang City on 2025-06-15 from 08:00-18:00.
